changelog:
Version 2.1.0 - Complete Release

✅ CLEANED UP UI:
• Organized sections with icons
• Consistent button styling
• Scrollable tool panel
• Professional color scheme

✅ ALL FEATURES:
• 4 Vehicles (Sedan, Pickup, 18-Wheeler, Motorcycle)
• Tree Obstacles
• Pedestrian Symbols
• 6 Road Types (2-Lane, 4-Lane, Highway, Intersection)
• Straight & Curved Roads
• 5 Arrow Types (Straight, Turn Left/Right, Curve Left/Right)
• Text Labels
• Compass
• 8-10 Control Buttons per Object
• PDF Export
• Auto-Update Functionality

✅ CONTROLS:
• Rotation, Scaling, Width/Height Adjustment
• Curve Adjustment for Roads & Arrows
• Keyboard Shortcuts (R, Delete)
• Right-click to Rotate
• Drag to Move
